description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist cubic design. The exterior features a mix of dark and light facades, with large rectangular windows arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern. A spacious wooden deck surrounds the house, furnished with outdoor seating, a table, and a large patio umbrella, suggesting a focus on outdoor living. There are two trees adjacent to the house, providing shade and enhancing the urban residential feel. The main entryway is accessible via a small porch, and the house includes both ground-level and upper-level windows for ample natural light. The overall structure is compact yet stylish, with clean lines and a contemporary aesthetic.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a wooden deck with outdoor furniture and trees. The design is minimalist and contemporary, featuring both dark and light exterior walls.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry, large windows, wooden deck with outdoor furniture, and a tree partially obscuring the right side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, the contrast between the dark and light facades, and two trees flanking the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back entrance, upper and lower windows, and a clear view of the deck and patio umbrella.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a focus on the dark facade, deck area, and a tree positioned to the right.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a small porch, modern door, and minimal overhang, integrated into the deck area.
